theme_strategy: The Digital Playroom inside a Swiss Bank - Playful Neo-brutalism meets high-contrast administrative clarity.

rules: Overlines must be uppercase, tracking-[0.2em] and tiny
Use explicit alignments, never default to center-align for paragraphs

surfaces.kids_cards: Neo-Brutalist: Solid bright background (e.g. #FFD500), heavy dark border (border-2 border-slate-900), heavy hard shadow (shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(15,23,42,1)])
surfaces.admin_cards: Grid Borders: Flat background, 1px border-border/40, no soft shadows, border-collapse styles.
surfaces.glass_panels: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-sm (Use for sticky headers and overlays)

layouts.landing_page: Mode A: The Tetris Grid (Asymmetric Bento). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8.
layouts.learning_area: Immersive fullscreen, massive tap targets (min-h-16), bento grid for modules (Counting, Shapes).
layouts.admin_dashboard: Mode B: High Density Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4, strict hierarchy.

motion.kids_interactions: Bouncy physics: hover:-translate-y-2 hover:shadow-[4px_8px_0px_0px_rgba(15,23,42,1)] active:translate-y-0 active:shadow-none transition-all duration-200
motion.admin_interactions: Subtle and sharp: hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-gray-800 transition-colors
motion.page_transitions: Staggered fade-up for lists, framer-motion recommended.

components_instructions.buttons: Kids: Pill-shaped or heavily rounded, neo-brutalist shadows. Admin: Sharp edges (rounded-md), subtle hover states.
components_instructions.forms: Use Shadcn customized heavily. Input fields need 2px borders, focus:ring-2 focus:border-black.
components_instructions.tables: Shadcn tables for Admin. Use explicit text colors on hover. No muddy grays.
components_instructions.charts: Shadcn charts (Recharts) for Admin/Parent analytics. Bright colors matching the kids theme.
components_instructions.modals: Use Shadcn Dialog. Never use transparent backgrounds without blur.

assets.icons: lucide-react for Admin/Parents. Phosphor Icons (Duotone) for Kids area.

images.description: Child playing with alphabet puzzle on carpet
Parent surfing laptop while kid plays
a child is playing with wooden blocks on the floor
Vibrant 3D abstract sphere with pastel colors

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, or uniform styling.
Apply 'Neo-Brutalist' borders (2px solid slate-900) on colorful cards to make them pop and feel like physical toys for the learning area.
Use framer-motion for micro-animations, especially bouncy physics for kids' UI elements.
Never use transparent backgrounds without blur for overlays or headers.
Always explicitly set hover text colors (e.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white).
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='pricing-tier-monthly').
Do not use HTML-based components for advanced interactions; use Shadcn UI customized.
Ensure high contrast for readability, tinting greys with blue or orange to avoid 'dead' colors.
For the parent dashboard and admin panel, use strictly left-aligned geometric precision to build trust (financial/admin vibe).
Include both Stripe and manual Bank QR code options prominently in the pricing/checkout flows, keeping a trustworthy, secure appearance for this specific section.

accessibility.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 for normal text. Ensure text over images has adequate text-shadow.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Add aria-hidden to decorative elements.
accessibility.tap_targets: Minimum 48x48px for all clickable elements in the kids area.

3d_libraries.recommendation: Use framer-motion for 2.5D bouncy interactions (Neo-Brutalism) to maintain high performance across mobile devices in Sri Lanka. Use static high-quality vibrant 3D renders for landing page flair.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a dual-theme system. The /admin and /parent routes should use the 'Grid Borders' layout and 'Outfit' font for a highly professional, trustworthy look. The /learn routes should use the 'Neo-Brutalist' colorful style with 'Fredoka' font to maximize engagement for kids aged 5-10. Use standard Tailwind configuration to set up these dual palettes.
